heading: Computation of time
label: 3766 Computation of time
text: Periods of time provided for in this chapter shall be calculated in consecutive calendar days, including the day or days on which the actions or events occur or are to occur for which the period of time is provided and including the day on which an event occurs or is to occur from which the period is to be calculated.
notes: CodificationSection is based on section 817 of title VIII of S. 2281, One Hundred Third Congress, as reported , which was enacted into law by .July 13, 1994Pub. L. 103–327
